name: EmptyState
description: Placeholder for a content area with no data — empty lists, zero results, first-time setup. API mirrors industry convention (Astryx EmptyState): always a title and a next step; the icon is decorative.

props.name: description
props.default: When items are added they will show up in this list.
props.description: Secondary text explaining what will appear here and how.

slots.description: Decorative icon or illustration above the title.
